desc: The standard mod installer for Infinity Engine games. Required to install virtually all IE mods.
Comprehensive resource browser and editor for Infinity Engine games. View and edit game files, scripts, dialogues, and more.
Save game editor for Enhanced Edition games. Edit characters, stats, items, spells, and more.
Dragonlance Total Conversion Editor Pro. Advanced modding tool for creating and editing IE game resources.
Automates packaging of WeiDU mods for distribution. Creates standardized mod archives.
Graphical batch installer for WeiDU mods. Queue and install multiple mods with a GUI.
Mod manager with install-order awareness and conflict detection. Manages large mod setups with dependency tracking.
Modern Python-based GUI for automating mod installation. Cross-platform (Windows/Linux), multi-language, syncs with the Infinity Engine Mod List database.
Automated EET installation framework. Project has been discontinued; GitHub repo removed.
Compresses game override files into BIFF archives, greatly reducing load times for heavily-modded installs.
Lightweight resource viewer for Infinity Engine games. Quick browsing of game files without full editing capabilities.
Editor for BAM (animation) files used in Infinity Engine games. Create and modify sprite animations, icons, and cursors.
Tool for unpacking and repacking TIS (tileset) files. Essential for area visual modding.
Flexible mod packaging tool with many customization options. Creates distributable mod archives from WeiDU mod source files.
Cross-platform command-line WeiDU mod installer. Automates mod installation from a weidu.log file.
Infinity Engine Structures Description Project. The reference documentation for all IE file formats.
Automates conversion of PVRZ textures between different compression types for Infinity Engine Enhanced Edition games.
Creates DLC packages for Enhanced Edition games. Packages mod content as installable DLC extensions.
Horizontally mirrors any given map from Infinity Engine games. Useful for creating mirrored area variants.
Helps debug malfunctioning scripts causing game stutter. Identifies problematic script blocks and actions.
Real-time radar overlay for BG2:EE showing creature positions, fog of war, and pathfinding data.
Modding toolkit for Infinity Engine games. Provides utilities for mod development and resource management.
Extracts and converts NPC portraits from Infinity Engine games for use as custom character portraits.
Configuration tool for Infinity Engine Enhanced Edition game settings and ini file management.
Post-processing tool for Infinity Engine mod installations. Handles cleanup and optimization after mod installation.
WeiDU mod that adds cheat/test items for mod development. Maximizes attack, HP, and various stats for testing.
Custom game launcher for Enhanced Edition Trilogy. Manages game startup with proper configuration for the merged trilogy.
